name: Datejust 36
description:
The Datejust 36 is where iconic Rolex design meets an accessible entry into the collection. The 36mm case sits elegantly on all wrist sizes — neither too bold nor too understated. The black dial with silver applied indices projects quiet confidence.

For those entering the world of luxury timepieces, the Datejust 36 Essential is the perfect starting point. You get the look, the weight, and the wrist presence of a true Rolex — curated by Artemis for design accuracy and visual impact.
descriptionShort: Entry into the Rolex Datejust legacy. 36mm, black dial — understated luxury at its finest.
keyPoints: Black dial with applied silver indices
Jubilee bracelet with polished center links
Essential range — best value entry point
Pairs with both casual and formal attire
seoTitle: Rolex Datejust 36 Black Dial — Essential | Artemis Watches Montreal
seoDescription: Shop the Rolex Datejust 36 (Black Dial) at Artemis — Montreal's premier luxury watch destination. Essential range, 30-day guarantee, free shipping. $320 CAD.
